items.title: Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth Theorem
items.content_text: # Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth TheoremWe work first in \( \Ab = \Z \)-Mod. The target is the Künneth exact sequence\[ 0 \to H(C)\otimes H(D) \to H(C\otimes D) \to \Tor_1^{\Z}(H(C),H(D)) \to 0 \]**Paste the full proof from your .tex file below this line.**(Use $$ for display math. The macros above should make \Tor, \Z, \Ab, etc. work.)
items.content_html: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js" async></script><script>MathJax = {  tex: {    inlineMath: [['\\(', '\\)']],    displayMath: [['$$', '$$']],    macros: {      Z: '\\mathbb{Z}',      Q: '\\mathbb{Q}',      F: '\\mathbb{F}',      Hom: '\\mathrm{Hom}',      Tor: '\\mathrm{Tor}',      Ext: '\\mathrm{Ext}',      im: '\\mathrm{im}',      coker: '\\mathrm{coker}',      pd: '\\mathrm{pd}',      Ab: '\\mathbf{Ab}'    }  }};</script># Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth TheoremWe work first in \( \Ab = \Z \)-Mod. The target is the Künneth exact sequence\[ 0 \to H(C)\otimes H(D) \to H(C\otimes D) \to \Tor_1^{\Z}(H(C),H(D)) \to 0 \]**Paste the full proof from your .tex file below this line.**(Use $$ for display math. The macros above should make \Tor, \Z, \Ab, etc. work.)
